scenarios.name: Observer happy path
assertions: latest log has required activity fields

scenarios.name: Publisher blocked by unsafe gap
steps: POST /api/run-publisher with force=false under unsafe condition
assertions: response.error or response.message includes gap policy reason

scenarios.name: Manual override path
assertions: result payload includes success boolean and log snapshot

scenarios.name: Frontend polling contract
assertions: UI renders latest status and chart data
no schema mismatch in console for contract fields

scenarios.name: Trend insights contract
assertions: response includes windowDays, trendMultiplier, hourlyProfile length 24
confidenceReason is one of the contract enum values
